scripts.autopilot: docker compose -f ../stock_report_website/docker-compose.yml up -d && AUTOPILOT_MESSAGE="$npm_config_message" WORKER_CMD='python3 tools/approved/run_autopilot.py --loop --gen-timeout 300 --bt-timeout 300' STALE_SECS=900 bash tools/approved/watchdog.sh
scripts.autopilot:test: docker compose -f ../stock_report_website/docker-compose.yml up -d && AUTOPILOT_MESSAGE="$npm_config_message" python3 tools/approved/run_autopilot.py --once --generator mutate --dry-run --test-key exp_dryrun
scripts.autopilot:sweep: WORKER_CMD='python3 tools/approved/run_autopilot.py --loop --generator mutate' STALE_SECS=900 bash tools/approved/watchdog.sh
